# Formora

> A modern form builder platform with multiple rendering styles, analytics, conditional logic, and team collaboration.

## Overview
Formora is a powerful form building platform that lets users create beautiful, functional forms with multiple rendering styles (classic, conversational, marketing, minimal, neo-brutalism), advanced conditional logic, analytics, and team features.

## Key Features
- **Form Builder** — Drag-and-drop form creation with rich question types
- **Multiple Renderers** — Classic, Conversational, Marketing, Minimal, Neo-Brutalism styles
- **Form Templates** — Pre-built form templates for quick setup
- **Conditional Logic** — Advanced branching and conditional question display
- **Analytics Dashboard** — Real-time form response analytics
- **Email Notifications** — Automated email alerts for form submissions
- **Team Collaboration** — Multi-user team support
- **Slack Integration** — Send form responses directly to Slack
- **Webhooks** — Custom webhook integrations
- **Enterprise Security** — Built-in security features for enterprise use
- **Form Sharing** — Share forms via unique URLs (`/f/[formId]`)

## Pages
- `/` — Landing page
- `/dashboard` — Dashboard overview
- `/dashboard/forms` — All forms
- `/dashboard/forms/new` — Create new form
- `/dashboard/forms/[formId]` — Form editor
- `/dashboard/forms/[formId]/analytics` — Form analytics
- `/dashboard/responses` — All form responses
- `/dashboard/settings` — Account settings
- `/f/[formId]` — Public form rendering

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- Appwrite (Backend)
- Stack Auth (Authentication)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- shadcn/ui
